cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)

#
# Gambos firmware (top-level orchestration).
# - Toolchain + Cube source map are generated under build/<BOARD>/generated by scripts/gen-board-sources.sh
# - STM32CubeMX output under board/<BOARD>/ (CMakeLists.txt, cmake/) is left as generated and treated as source-of-truth input.
#

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS ON)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE "Debug")
endif()

set(CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME gambos)

set(BOARD "devkit" CACHE STRING "Target board" FORCE)
message(STATUS "Board: ${BOARD}")

set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS TRUE)

set(CUBEMX_GENERATED_FILE "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/generated/cubemx_paths.cmake")
if(NOT EXISTS "${CUBEMX_GENERATED_FILE}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "Missing generated Cube source map: ${CUBEMX_GENERATED_FILE}\n"
        "Run: ./scripts/build.sh ${BOARD}\n"
        "This generates build/${BOARD}/generated/toolchain.cmake and cubemx_paths.cmake from board/${BOARD}/cmake/."
    )
endif()
include("${CUBEMX_GENERATED_FILE}")

if(NOT CUBEMX_BOARD STREQUAL "${BOARD}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "Generated Cube source map is for BOARD='${CUBEMX_BOARD}' but current BOARD='${BOARD}'. "
        "Re-run: ./scripts/build.sh ${BOARD}"
    )
endif()

project(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} LANGUAGES C CXX ASM)
message(STATUS "Build type: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")

add_executable(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME})

foreach(_required
    MX_Defines_Syms
    MX_Include_Dirs
    MX_Application_Src
    STM32_Drivers_Src
    FreeRTOS_Src
    MX_LINK_LIBS
)
    if(NOT DEFINED ${_required})
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Generated Cube source map missing variable: ${_required}")
    endif()
endforeach()

add_library(stm32cubemx INTERFACE)
target_include_directories(stm32cubemx INTERFACE ${MX_Include_Dirs})
target_compile_definitions(stm32cubemx INTERFACE ${MX_Defines_Syms})

add_library(STM32_Drivers OBJECT)
target_sources(STM32_Drivers PRIVATE ${STM32_Drivers_Src})
target_link_libraries(STM32_Drivers PUBLIC stm32cubemx)

add_library(FreeRTOS OBJECT)
target_sources(FreeRTOS PRIVATE ${FreeRTOS_Src})
target_link_libraries(FreeRTOS PUBLIC stm32cubemx)

target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${MX_Application_Src})
target_link_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${MX_LINK_DIRS})
target_link_libraries(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} ${MX_LINK_LIBS})
set_target_properties(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES ADDITIONAL_CLEAN_FILES ${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}.map)

add_subdirectory(custom_drivers)

target_link_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE)

add_subdirectory(app/${BOARD})

target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/app/${BOARD}
)

target_compile_definitions(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE)

list(REMOVE_ITEM CMAKE_C_IMPLICIT_LINK_LIBRARIES ob)

target_link_libraries(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}
    stm32cubemx
    custom_drivers
)
